title: Sweet & Chewy Australian Russet Potato Stir-fry
description: A keto-friendly and date-night appropriate dish featuring sweet and chewy russet potatoes with a touch of toasting for added texture.
instructions: Slice russet potatoes into thin rounds and place on a baking sheet. Drizzle with coconut oil, sprinkle with brown sugar, ground almonds, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Toss evenly.
Bake for about 15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
In a large skillet over medium heat, add 2 tablespoons of coconut oil. Once hot, add the russet potato rounds from the oven, spreading them out to prevent sticking.
Stir frequently with tongs, adding more oil as needed, for about 5-7 minutes or until desired crispiness is achieved. The potatoes should be golden and slightly caramelized but not burnt.
Add brown sugar, ground almonds, garlic powder, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Stir well and cook for an additional minute to meld all flavors together.
Serve hot as a side dish or alongside other keto-friendly meal options.
